text.title: Lemon Squeezy Ops Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to set up, launch, and review a Lemon Squeezy store.

step.name: store-setup
step.action: Create LS store. Set MoR = true. Configure refund policy. Confirm payout bank.
step.output: Store live with 6 mandatory fields filled.
step.decision-gate: Any field missing → block per r1.

step.name: variant-definition
step.action: For each variant: name, amount, interval (one_time | monthly | yearly), license_api_enabled. Cap active variants at 8.

step.name: license-api-wiring
step.action: For each subscription variant, enable LS License API. Integrate `/v1/licenses/validate` in client. Daily revalidation job.
step.output: Client validates keys; LS dashboard shows license activity.
step.decision-gate: Subscription variant with license_api_enabled=false → block per r3.

step.name: affiliate-program
step.action: Enable LS affiliate program. Set commission_pct in band. Recruit 5-10 partners with tracked links.

step.name: dunning-sequence
step.action: Configure dunning emails at T+1, T+4, T+8 with copy from template. Test with a failed-payment fixture in LS test mode.
step.output: Sequence verified in test mode → enabled in live.

step.name: monthly-review
step.action: Compute conversion_rate, refund_rate per variant. Promote top 2; demote bottom 2 (archive or unbundle). Update review block in store config.
